reviews.review_description:
It will not download on my 
Vr

Feels like a beta. Gas some bugs. I'm hoping it gets sorted out because alot of us would love alternative poker games. That said, it's going to be real hard to get people to jump ship if the game isn't using the meta avatars.

I can see potential however I did not enjoy the 10 minutes that I played. I could be wrong but I played a game with other players and no one had a voice. The players had preset words that were used which I found odd for VR. I didn’t feel like I was playing against other Live players. Please add other avatars of color to represent everyone that is playing the game.
